# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    status: init.status ?? 200,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...(init.headers ?? {}),
    },
  });
}

function badRequest(message: string): Response {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message }, { status: 400 });
}

function notFound(message = "Not found"): Response {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message }, { status: 404 });
}

function parseValue(value: string): string | number | boolean {
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (trimmed === "true") return true;
  if (trimmed === "false") return false;
  if (trimmed !== "" && !Number.isNaN(Number(trimmed)) && /^-?(?:\d+\.?\d*|\d*\.?\d+)$/.test(trimmed)) {
    return Number(trimmed);
  }
  return trimmed;
}

function sanitizeKeyPart(input: string): string | number | boolean {
  const v = parseValue(input);
  if (typeof v === "string" && v.length > 256) return v.slice(0, 256);
  return v;
}

function buildUserKey(userId: string, filterParam: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", sanitizeKeyPart(userId), sanitizeKeyPart(filterParam)];
}

function isPlainObject(value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> {
  return typeof value === "object" && value !== null && !Array.isArray(value);
}

async function createUser(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const body = await req.json().catch(() => null);
  if (!isPlainObject(body)) return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");

  const userId = typeof body.userId === "string" ? body.userId.trim() : "";
  if (!userId) return badRequest("userId is required");

  const data = { ...body };
  await kv.set(buildUserKey(userId, "profile"), data);
  return jsonResponse({ ok: true, key: ["users", userId, "profile"], data }, { status: 201 });
}

async function getUser(req: Request, userId: string): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const filterParam = url.searchParams.get("filter") ?? "profile";
  const result = await kv.get(buildUserKey(userId, filterParam));
  if (!result.value) return notFound("User data not found");
  return jsonResponse({ key: ["users", userId, filterParam], value: result.value });
}

async function searchUsers(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId")?.trim();
  if (!userId) return badRequest("userId query parameter is required");

  const filters: Array<[string, string]> = [];
  for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    if (key === "userId") continue;
    filters.push([key, value]);
  }

  if (filters.length === 0) {
    const result = await kv.get(buildUserKey(userId, "profile"));
    return jsonResponse({
      userId,
      results: result.value ? [{ key: ["users", userId, "profile"], value: result.value }] : [],
    });
  }

  const results: Array<{ key: Deno.KvKey; value: unknown }> = [];

  for (const [filterParam, filterValue] of filters) {
    const key = buildUserKey(userId, filterParam);
    const current = await kv.get(key);
    if (current.value === undefined) continue;

    const stored = current.value;

    if (typeof filterValue === "string" && filterValue.includes("*")) {
      const pattern = new RegExp("^" + filterValue.split("*").map((part) => part.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")).join(".*") + "$", "i");
      const candidate = typeof stored === "string" || typeof stored === "number" || typeof stored === "boolean" ? String(stored) : JSON.stringify(stored);
      if (!pattern.test(candidate)) continue;
    } else if (isPlainObject(stored)) {
      const storedValue = stored[filterParam];
      if (storedValue === undefined) continue;
      if (String(storedValue) !== filterValue) continue;
    } else {
      if (String(stored) !== filterValue) continue;
    }

    results.push({ key, value: stored });
  }

  return jsonResponse({ userId, results });
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const pathname = url.pathname;

    if (req.method === "POST" && pathname === "/users") {
      return await createUser(req);
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/search") {
      return await searchUsers(req);
    }

    const userMatch = pathname.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
    if (req.method === "GET" && userMatch) {
      return await getUser(req, decodeURIComponent(userMatch[1]));
    }

    return notFound();
  } catch (error) {
    return jsonResponse(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Internal Server Error" },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
});
